docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-5.md:3417:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-4.md:11764:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-2.md:1912:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-1.md:1460:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-4.md:5284:1543:  | `supabase/tests/smoke/t10_client_active_check.sql` (V7 + V10 cron-context + V13 undo-setup) | **V13-SETUP (Codex runde 12):** efter `begin;` skal testen sætte `stork.t9_write_authorized='true'` og UPDATE `core_identity.undo_settings SET undo_period_seconds = 0 WHERE change_type IN ('client_place','client_close')` for at omgå T9's 24-timers default-undo-periode. ROLLBACK ved test-slut isolerer ændringen. Uden dette rammer apply-vej `not_yet_due` før aktiv-check. **Tests:** T1: opret aktiv klient → `client_node_place` succeeds → pending oprettes → approve+apply succeeds → placement findes. T2: `client_set_active(client_id, false)` → ny `client_node_place` på samme klient + nyt team → forvent **22023 `client_inactive`**. T3 (apply-path-scenarie): non-admin opretter pending mens klient aktiv → non-admin approver → deaktiver klient → apply → forvent **P0001 `apply_client_place: client_inactive`**. T4: `client_node_close` på inaktiv klient → success (ingen aktiv-check her). **T4a (V14):** `client_node_close` på ikke-eksisterende client_id → forvent **P0002 `client_not_found`** (eksistens-check tilføjet i V14). **T5 superadmin-bypass wrapper (Mathias 2026-05-21):** med superadmin-auth, place på inaktiv klient → success. **T6 (V10 cron-context):** superadmin opretter pending mens klient aktiv → deaktiver klient → simulér cron-apply (kør apply uden auth-context via `reset role` + direct `_apply_client_place`-call eller `pending_change_apply` som service_role) → success (bypass via `is_admin_by_employee_id(requested_by)`). **T7 (V10):** non-admin opretter pending → superadmin approver → klient deaktiveres → cron-apply → success (bypass via approved_by). **T8 (V10):** non-admin opretter pending → non-admin approver → klient deaktiveres → cron-apply → P0001 (ingen admin involveret). Test SKAL være `begin;` + `rollback;`-wrapped. |
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-5.md:3418:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-4.md:11766:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-2.md:1914:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-1.md:1462:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-4.md:5335:  1542	  | `supabase/tests/smoke/t10_clients_validate_fields.sql`                                      | LENIENT-default: unknown key i fields → warning, INSERT accepteret. Strict-mode (`stork.clients_fields_strict='true'`): unknown key → exception. **V2 (Codex V1 MELLEM):** assert at non-object fields (`'"scalar"'::jsonb`, `'[1,2]'::jsonb`) afvises af `clients_fields_is_object`-CHECK (errcode 23514). **V2 (Codex V1 KRITISK-SIKKERHEDSHUL):** assert audit-PII-hashing rammer direct-PII keys i fields selv efter felt-definitionen er sat is_active=false.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |

ROLLBACK ved test-slut isolerer ændringen. Uden dette rammer apply-vej `not_yet_due` før aktiv-check. **Tests:** T1: opret aktiv klient → `client_node_place` succeeds → pending oprettes → approve+apply succeeds → placement findes. T2: `client_set_active(client_id, false)` → ny `client_node_place` på samme klient + nyt team → forvent **22023 `client_inactive`**. T3 (apply-path-scenarie): non-admin opretter pending mens klient aktiv → non-admin approver → deaktiver klient → apply → forvent **P0001 `apply_client_place: client_inactive`**. T4: `client_node_close` på inaktiv klient → success (ingen aktiv-check her). **T4a (V14):** `client_node_close` på ikke-eksisterende client_id → forvent **P0002 `client_not_found`** (eksistens-check tilføjet i V14). **T5 superadmin-bypass wrapper (Mathias 2026-05-21):** med superadmin-auth, place på inaktiv klient → success. **T6 (V10 cron-context):** superadmin opretter pending mens klient aktiv → deaktiver klient → simulér cron-apply (kør apply uden auth-context via `reset role` + direct `_apply_client_place`-call eller `pending_change_apply` som service_role) → success (bypass via `is_admin_by_employee_id(requested_by)`). **T7 (V10):** non-admin opretter pending → superadmin approver → klient deaktiveres → cron-apply → success (bypass via approved_by). **T8 (V10):** non-admin opretter pending → non-admin approver → klient deaktiveres → cron-apply → P0001 (ingen admin involveret). Test SKAL være `begin;` + `rollback;`-wrapped. |

Master-plan §3 punkt 19 specificerer fitness-checken men den er ikke implementeret. T9-migration-kommentar (`20260518000004_t9_client_node_placements.sql:5`) er forhåndsdokumentation, ikke nuværende fitness-check.                                    | Code-validering  | **ACCEPT.** Omformulér T10.16: i stedet for "fjern client_id fra allowlist", verificér at FK-coverage-checken er implementeret; hvis ikke, ingen fitness-script-ændring nødvendig for FK. **Plus** tilføj `core_identity.client_field_definitions_list` til `LEGACY_IS_ACTIVE_EXEMPT_FUNCTIONS` (fund #5). G-nummer-kandidat for "FK-coverage-fitness-check ikke implementeret per master-plan §3.19". |
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-5.md:3476:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-4.md:11865:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-2.md:2013:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-1.md:1561:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-4.md:8623:docs/coordination/arkiv/trin-10-plan.md:1543:  | `supabase/tests/smoke/t10_client_active_check.sql` (V7 + V10 cron-context + V13 undo-setup) | **V13-SETUP (Codex runde 12):** efter `begin;` skal testen sætte `stork.t9_write_authorized='true'` og UPDATE `core_identity.undo_settings SET undo_period_seconds = 0 WHERE change_type IN ('client_place','client_close')` for at omgå T9's 24-timers default-undo-periode. ROLLBACK ved test-slut isolerer ændringen. Uden dette rammer apply-vej `not_yet_due` før aktiv-check. **Tests:** T1: opret aktiv klient → `client_node_place` succeeds → pending oprettes → approve+apply succeeds → placement findes. T2: `client_set_active(client_id, false)` → ny `client_node_place` på samme klient + nyt team → forvent **22023 `client_inactive`**. T3 (apply-path-scenarie): non-admin opretter pending mens klient aktiv → non-admin approver → deaktiver klient → apply → forvent **P0001 `apply_client_place: client_inactive`**. T4: `client_node_close` på inaktiv klient → success (ingen aktiv-check her). **T4a (V14):** `client_node_close` på ikke-eksisterende client_id → forvent **P0002 `client_not_found`** (eksistens-check tilføjet i V14). **T5 superadmin-bypass wrapper (Mathias 2026-05-21):** med superadmin-auth, place på inaktiv klient → success. **T6 (V10 cron-context):** superadmin opretter pending mens klient aktiv → deaktiver klient → simulér cron-apply (kør apply uden auth-context via `reset role` + direct `_apply_client_place`-call eller `pending_change_apply` som service_role) → success (bypass via `is_admin_by_employee_id(requested_by)`). **T7 (V10):** non-admin opretter pending → superadmin approver → klient deaktiveres → cron-apply → success (bypass via approved_by). **T8 (V10):** non-admin opretter pending → non-admin approver → klient deaktiveres → cron-apply → P0001 (ingen admin involveret). Test SKAL være `begin;` + `rollback;`-wrapped. |

Trin 10 tilføjer `core_identity.client_field_definitions_list` (T10.16) fordi `client_field_definitions` har kun is_active, ingen status-kolonne. **FK_COVERAGE_EXEMPTIONS findes IKKE** — master-plan §3.19 ikke implementeret (V6-fund #4).                                                 |

Jeg kører fitness lokalt for at validere den rapporterede grønne disciplinstatus mod nuværende checkout.
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-5.md:3497:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-4.md:11903:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-2.md:2051:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-1.md:2101:**G-numre rejst:** G057 (T9 forretnings-invariants uden superadmin-bypass), G058 (FK-coverage-fitness-check ikke implementeret per master-plan §3.19).
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-5.md:3498:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-4.md:11905:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-2.md:3346:- **Trin 10** (Klient-skabelon: core_identity.clients + client_field_definitions + logo + is_active + FK fra T9 + aktiv-check med superadmin-bypass + employee-id-baseret apply-bypass for cron-context + PII-hashing for logo) afsluttet 2026-05-21 via PR #64 (squash-merged til main, commit `1831760`). Plan V14 efter 14 Codex plan-runder + 5 Codex build-review-runder (APPROVAL runde 5). 14 migrations (inkl. T10.13c reverse-legacy) + 6 smoke-tests + fitness-script-allowlist + master-plan §1.8 + §4 trin 10 rettelser. G057 + G058 registreret som teknisk gæld. Plan + krav-dok + approval-fil arkiveret i `docs/coordination/arkiv/`. Slut-rapport: `rapport-historik/2026-05-21-trin-10.md`.

docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-5.md:3501:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-4.md:11929:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-2.md:4531:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-1.md:819:| 1   | TEKNISK-BLOKERING | T10.15 `t10_client_active_check.sql` | T9 seed (`20260518000004:228-229`) sætter `undo_settings.undo_period_seconds = 24*3600` for `client_place`/`client_close`. `pending_change_apply` stopper med `not_yet_due` før dispatch til `_apply_client_place`. Test rammer due-gate, ikke aktiv-checken. | **ACCEPT.** T10.15 udvidet med setup-disciplin: BEGIN-blokken sætter `set_config('stork.t9_write_authorized', 'true', true)` + UPDATE `undo_settings SET undo_period_seconds = 0 WHERE change_type IN ('client_place', 'client_close')` transaction-local. ROLLBACK ved test-slut sikrer ingen lækage. | T10.15     |
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-5.md:3502:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-4.md:11935:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-2.md:4537:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-1.md:900:| 3   | MELLEM   | T10.15             | Smoke-test dækker FK-eksistens + ON DELETE RESTRICT, men ikke det vigtigste forretningskrav (krav-dok §2.5.2: inaktiv klient kan ikke vælges).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   | **ACCEPT.** Ny separat smoke-test `t10_client_active_check.sql` med 4 scenarier: aktiv place success, inaktiv place rejection (22023), pending-mens-aktiv + deaktiver + apply rejection (P0001), close virker på inaktiv klient.                                                                                                                                                                                   | T10.15 + ny test-fil          |
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-5.md:3503:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-4.md:11939:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-2.md:4541:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-1.md:999:docs/coordination/arkiv/trin-10-plan.md:1542:  | `supabase/tests/smoke/t10_clients_validate_fields.sql`                                      | LENIENT-default: unknown key i fields → warning, INSERT accepteret. Strict-mode (`stork.clients_fields_strict='true'`): unknown key → exception. **V2 (Codex V1 MELLEM):** assert at non-object fields (`'"scalar"'::jsonb`, `'[1,2]'::jsonb`) afvises af `clients_fields_is_object`-CHECK (errcode 23514). **V2 (Codex V1 KRITISK-SIKKERHEDSHUL):** assert audit-PII-hashing rammer direct-PII keys i fields selv efter felt-definitionen er sat is_active=false.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-5.md:3504:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-4.md:11940:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-2.md:4542:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-1.md:1000:docs/coordination/arkiv/trin-10-plan.md:1543:  | `supabase/tests/smoke/t10_client_active_check.sql` (V7 + V10 cron-context + V13 undo-setup) | **V13-SETUP (Codex runde 12):** efter `begin;` skal testen sætte `stork.t9_write_authorized='true'` og UPDATE `core_identity.undo_settings SET undo_period_seconds = 0 WHERE change_type IN ('client_place','client_close')` for at omgå T9's 24-timers default-undo-periode. ROLLBACK ved test-slut isolerer ændringen. Uden dette rammer apply-vej `not_yet_due` før aktiv-check. **Tests:** T1: opret aktiv klient → `client_node_place` succeeds → pending oprettes → approve+apply succeeds → placement findes. T2: `client_set_active(client_id, false)` → ny `client_node_place` på samme klient + nyt team → forvent **22023 `client_inactive`**. T3 (apply-path-scenarie): non-admin opretter pending mens klient aktiv → non-admin approver → deaktiver klient → apply → forvent **P0001 `apply_client_place: client_inactive`**. T4: `client_node_close` på inaktiv klient → success (ingen aktiv-check her). **T4a (V14):** `client_node_close` på ikke-eksisterende client_id → forvent **P0002 `client_not_found`** (eksistens-check tilføjet i V14). **T5 superadmin-bypass wrapper (Mathias 2026-05-21):** med superadmin-auth, place på inaktiv klient → success. **T6 (V10 cron-context):** superadmin opretter pending mens klient aktiv → deaktiver klient → simulér cron-apply (kør apply uden auth-context via `reset role` + direct `_apply_client_place`-call eller `pending_change_apply` som service_role) → success (bypass via `is_admin_by_employee_id(requested_by)`). **T7 (V10):** non-admin opretter pending → superadmin approver → klient deaktiveres → cron-apply → success (bypass via approved_by). **T8 (V10):** non-admin opretter pending → non-admin approver → klient deaktiveres → cron-apply → P0001 (ingen admin involveret). Test SKAL være `begin;` + `rollback;`-wrapped. |
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-5.md:3505:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-4.md:11941:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-2.md:4543:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-1.md:1018:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-5.md:37:Max 350 ord output. T4: `client_node_close` på inaktiv klient → success (ingen aktiv-check her). **T4a (V14):** `client_node_close` på ikke-eksisterende client_id → forvent **P0002 `client_not_found`** (eksistens-check tilføjet i V14). **T5 superadmin-bypass wrapper (Mathias 2026-05-21):** med superadmin-auth, place på inaktiv klient → success. **T6 (V10 cron-context):** superadmin opretter pending mens klient aktiv → deaktiver klient → simulér cron-apply (kør apply uden auth-context via `reset role` + direct `_apply_client_place`-call eller `pending_change_apply` som service_role) → success (bypass via `is_admin_by_employee_id(requested_by)`). **T7 (V10):** non-admin opretter pending → superadmin approver → klient deaktiveres → cron-apply → success (bypass via approved_by). **T8 (V10):** non-admin opretter pending → non-admin approver → klient deaktiveres → cron-apply → P0001 (ingen admin involveret). Test SKAL være `begin;` + `rollback;`-wrapped. |
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-5.md:3508:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-4.md:11949:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-2.md:4551:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-1.md:1177:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-4.md:692:1543:  | `supabase/tests/smoke/t10_client_active_check.sql` (V7 + V10 cron-context + V13 undo-setup) | **V13-SETUP (Codex runde 12):** efter `begin;` skal testen sætte `stork.t9_write_authorized='true'` og UPDATE `core_identity.undo_settings SET undo_period_seconds = 0 WHERE change_type IN ('client_place','client_close')` for at omgå T9's 24-timers default-undo-periode. ROLLBACK ved test-slut isolerer ændringen. Uden dette rammer apply-vej `not_yet_due` før aktiv-check. **Tests:** T1: opret aktiv klient → `client_node_place` succeeds → pending oprettes → approve+apply succeeds → placement findes. T2: `client_set_active(client_id, false)` → ny `client_node_place` på samme klient + nyt team → forvent **22023 `client_inactive`**. T3 (apply-path-scenarie): non-admin opretter pending mens klient aktiv → non-admin approver → deaktiver klient → apply → forvent **P0001 `apply_client_place: client_inactive`**. T4: `client_node_close` på inaktiv klient → success (ingen aktiv-check her). **T4a (V14):** `client_node_close` på ikke-eksisterende client_id → forvent **P0002 `client_not_found`** (eksistens-check tilføjet i V14). **T5 superadmin-bypass wrapper (Mathias 2026-05-21):** med superadmin-auth, place på inaktiv klient → success. **T6 (V10 cron-context):** superadmin opretter pending mens klient aktiv → deaktiver klient → simulér cron-apply (kør apply uden auth-context via `reset role` + direct `_apply_client_place`-call eller `pending_change_apply` som service_role) → success (bypass via `is_admin_by_employee_id(requested_by)`). **T7 (V10):** non-admin opretter pending → superadmin approver → klient deaktiveres → cron-apply → success (bypass via approved_by). **T8 (V10):** non-admin opretter pending → non-admin approver → klient deaktiveres → cron-apply → P0001 (ingen admin involveret). Test SKAL være `begin;` + `rollback;`-wrapped. |
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-5.md:3509:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-4.md:11951:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-2.md:4553:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-1.md:1261:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-4.md:1770:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-7.md:2041:  | `supabase/tests/smoke/t10_clients_validate_fields.sql`   | LENIENT-default: unknown key i fields → warning, INSERT accepteret. Strict-mode (`stork.clients_fields_strict='true'`): unknown key → exception. **V2 (Codex V1 MELLEM):** assert at non-object fields (`'"scalar"'::jsonb`, `'[1,2]'::jsonb`) afvises af `clients_fields_is_object`-CHECK (errcode 23514). **V2 (Codex V1 KRITISK-SIKKERHEDSHUL):** assert audit-PII-hashing rammer direct-PII keys i fields selv efter felt-definitionen er sat is_active=false.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |

T4: `client_node_close` på inaktiv klient → success (ingen aktiv-check her). **T4a (V14):** `client_node_close` på ikke-eksisterende client_id → forvent **P0002 `client_not_found`** (eksistens-check tilføjet i V14). **T5 superadmin-bypass wrapper (Mathias 2026-05-21):** med superadmin-auth, place på inaktiv klient → success. **T6 (V10 cron-context):** superadmin opretter pending mens klient aktiv → deaktiver klient → simulér cron-apply (kør apply uden auth-context via `reset role` + direct `_apply_client_place`-call eller `pending_change_apply` som service_role) → success (bypass via `is_admin_by_employee_id(requested_by)`). **T7 (V10):** non-admin opretter pending → superadmin approver → klient deaktiveres → cron-apply → success (bypass via approved_by). **T8 (V10):** non-admin opretter pending → non-admin approver → klient deaktiveres → cron-apply → P0001 (ingen admin involveret). Test SKAL være `begin;` + `rollback;`-wrapped. |

docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-5.md:3534:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-4.md:11983:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-2.md:4585:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-1.md:1532:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-4.md:8333:supabase/tests/smoke/t10_clients_validate_fields.sql:61:    raise exception 'T2 FAIL (V2 MELLEM): scalar jsonb skal afvises af clients_fields_is_object-CHECK';
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-5.md:3535:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-4.md:11985:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-2.md:4587:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-1.md:1561:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-4.md:8623:docs/coordination/arkiv/trin-10-plan.md:1543:  | `supabase/tests/smoke/t10_client_active_check.sql` (V7 + V10 cron-context + V13 undo-setup) | **V13-SETUP (Codex runde 12):** efter `begin;` skal testen sætte `stork.t9_write_authorized='true'` og UPDATE `core_identity.undo_settings SET undo_period_seconds = 0 WHERE change_type IN ('client_place','client_close')` for at omgå T9's 24-timers default-undo-periode. ROLLBACK ved test-slut isolerer ændringen. Uden dette rammer apply-vej `not_yet_due` før aktiv-check. **Tests:** T1: opret aktiv klient → `client_node_place` succeeds → pending oprettes → approve+apply succeeds → placement findes. T2: `client_set_active(client_id, false)` → ny `client_node_place` på samme klient + nyt team → forvent **22023 `client_inactive`**. T3 (apply-path-scenarie): non-admin opretter pending mens klient aktiv → non-admin approver → deaktiver klient → apply → forvent **P0001 `apply_client_place: client_inactive`**. T4: `client_node_close` på inaktiv klient → success (ingen aktiv-check her). **T4a (V14):** `client_node_close` på ikke-eksisterende client_id → forvent **P0002 `client_not_found`** (eksistens-check tilføjet i V14). **T5 superadmin-bypass wrapper (Mathias 2026-05-21):** med superadmin-auth, place på inaktiv klient → success. **T6 (V10 cron-context):** superadmin opretter pending mens klient aktiv → deaktiver klient → simulér cron-apply (kør apply uden auth-context via `reset role` + direct `_apply_client_place`-call eller `pending_change_apply` som service_role) → success (bypass via `is_admin_by_employee_id(requested_by)`). **T7 (V10):** non-admin opretter pending → superadmin approver → klient deaktiveres → cron-apply → success (bypass via approved_by). **T8 (V10):** non-admin opretter pending → non-admin approver → klient deaktiveres → cron-apply → P0001 (ingen admin involveret). Test SKAL være `begin;` + `rollback;`-wrapped. |
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-5.md:3536:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-4.md:11987:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-2.md:4589:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-1.md:1942:docs/coordination/arkiv/trin-10-plan.md:1542:  | `supabase/tests/smoke/t10_clients_validate_fields.sql`                                      | LENIENT-default: unknown key i fields → warning, INSERT accepteret. Strict-mode (`stork.clients_fields_strict='true'`): unknown key → exception. **V2 (Codex V1 MELLEM):** assert at non-object fields (`'"scalar"'::jsonb`, `'[1,2]'::jsonb`) afvises af `clients_fields_is_object`-CHECK (errcode 23514). **V2 (Codex V1 KRITISK-SIKKERHEDSHUL):** assert audit-PII-hashing rammer direct-PII keys i fields selv efter felt-definitionen er sat is_active=false.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-5.md:3537:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-4.md:11999:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-2.md:4601:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-1.md:2237:4824:108:| 3   | MELLEM   | T10.15             | Smoke-test dækker FK-eksistens + ON DELETE RESTRICT, men ikke det vigtigste forretningskrav (krav-dok §2.5.2: inaktiv klient kan ikke vælges).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   | **ACCEPT.** Ny separat smoke-test `t10_client_active_check.sql` med 4 scenarier: aktiv place success, inaktiv place rejection (22023), pending-mens-aktiv + deaktiver + apply rejection (P0001), close virker på inaktiv klient.                                                                                                                                                                                   | T10.15 + ny test-fil          |

ROLLBACK ved test-slut sikrer ingen lækage. | T10.15     |

T4: `client_node_close` på inaktiv klient → success (ingen aktiv-check her). **T4a (V14):** `client_node_close` på ikke-eksisterende client_id → forvent **P0002 `client_not_found`** (eksistens-check tilføjet i V14). **T5 superadmin-bypass wrapper (Mathias 2026-05-21):** med superadmin-auth, place på inaktiv klient → success. **T6 (V10 cron-context):** superadmin opretter pending mens klient aktiv → deaktiver klient → simulér cron-apply (kør apply uden auth-context via `reset role` + direct `_apply_client_place`-call eller `pending_change_apply` som service_role) → success (bypass via `is_admin_by_employee_id(requested_by)`). **T7 (V10):** non-admin opretter pending → superadmin approver → klient deaktiveres → cron-apply → success (bypass via approved_by). **T8 (V10):** non-admin opretter pending → non-admin approver → klient deaktiveres → cron-apply → P0001 (ingen admin involveret). Test SKAL være `begin;` + `rollback;`-wrapped. |

docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-5.md:3571:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-4.md:12268:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-3.md:6777:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-2.md:7087:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-14.md:1261:1543:  | `supabase/tests/smoke/t10_client_active_check.sql` (V7 + V10 cron-context + V13 undo-setup) | **V13-SETUP (Codex runde 12):** efter `begin;` skal testen sætte `stork.t9_write_authorized='true'` og UPDATE `core_identity.undo_settings SET undo_period_seconds = 0 WHERE change_type IN ('client_place','client_close')` for at omgå T9's 24-timers default-undo-periode. ROLLBACK ved test-slut isolerer ændringen. Uden dette rammer apply-vej `not_yet_due` før aktiv-check. **Tests:** T1: opret aktiv klient → `client_node_place` succeeds → pending oprettes → approve+apply succeeds → placement findes. T2: `client_set_active(client_id, false)` → ny `client_node_place` på samme klient + nyt team → forvent **22023 `client_inactive`**. T3 (apply-path-scenarie): non-admin opretter pending mens klient aktiv → non-admin approver → deaktiver klient → apply → forvent **P0001 `apply_client_place: client_inactive`**. T4: `client_node_close` på inaktiv klient → success (ingen aktiv-check her). **T4a (V14):** `client_node_close` på ikke-eksisterende client_id → forvent **P0002 `client_not_found`** (eksistens-check tilføjet i V14). **T5 superadmin-bypass wrapper (Mathias 2026-05-21):** med superadmin-auth, place på inaktiv klient → success. **T6 (V10 cron-context):** superadmin opretter pending mens klient aktiv → deaktiver klient → simulér cron-apply (kør apply uden auth-context via `reset role` + direct `_apply_client_place`-call eller `pending_change_apply` som service_role) → success (bypass via `is_admin_by_employee_id(requested_by)`). **T7 (V10):** non-admin opretter pending → superadmin approver → klient deaktiveres → cron-apply → success (bypass via approved_by). **T8 (V10):** non-admin opretter pending → non-admin approver → klient deaktiveres → cron-apply → P0001 (ingen admin involveret). Test SKAL være `begin;` + `rollback;`-wrapped. |

docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-5.md:3587:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-4.md:12557:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-3.md:7066:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-2.md:7376:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-4.md:3741:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:11013:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-14.md:1261:1543:  | `supabase/tests/smoke/t10_client_active_check.sql` (V7 + V10 cron-context + V13 undo-setup) | **V13-SETUP (Codex runde 12):** efter `begin;` skal testen sætte `stork.t9_write_authorized='true'` og UPDATE `core_identity.undo_settings SET undo_period_seconds = 0 WHERE change_type IN ('client_place','client_close')` for at omgå T9's 24-timers default-undo-periode. ROLLBACK ved test-slut isolerer ændringen. Uden dette rammer apply-vej `not_yet_due` før aktiv-check. **Tests:** T1: opret aktiv klient → `client_node_place` succeeds → pending oprettes → approve+apply succeeds → placement findes. T2: `client_set_active(client_id, false)` → ny `client_node_place` på samme klient + nyt team → forvent **22023 `client_inactive`**. T3 (apply-path-scenarie): non-admin opretter pending mens klient aktiv → non-admin approver → deaktiver klient → apply → forvent **P0001 `apply_client_place: client_inactive`**. T4: `client_node_close` på inaktiv klient → success (ingen aktiv-check her). **T4a (V14):** `client_node_close` på ikke-eksisterende client_id → forvent **P0002 `client_not_found`** (eksistens-check tilføjet i V14). **T5 superadmin-bypass wrapper (Mathias 2026-05-21):** med superadmin-auth, place på inaktiv klient → success. **T6 (V10 cron-context):** superadmin opretter pending mens klient aktiv → deaktiver klient → simulér cron-apply (kør apply uden auth-context via `reset role` + direct `_apply_client_place`-call eller `pending_change_apply` som service_role) → success (bypass via `is_admin_by_employee_id(requested_by)`). **T7 (V10):** non-admin opretter pending → superadmin approver → klient deaktiveres → cron-apply → success (bypass via approved_by). **T8 (V10):** non-admin opretter pending → non-admin approver → klient deaktiveres → cron-apply → P0001 (ingen admin involveret). Test SKAL være `begin;` + `rollback;`-wrapped. |

Test rammer due-gate, ikke aktiv-checken. | **ACCEPT.** T10.15 udvidet med setup-disciplin: BEGIN-blokken sætter `set_config('stork.t9_write_authorized', 'true', true)` + UPDATE `undo_settings SET undo_period_seconds = 0 WHERE change_type IN ('client_place', 'client_close')` transaction-local. ROLLBACK ved test-slut sikrer ingen lækage. | T10.15     |

Test rammer due-gate, ikke aktiv-checken. | **ACCEPT.** T10.15 udvidet med setup-disciplin: BEGIN-blokken sætter `set_config('stork.t9_write_authorized', 'true', true)` + UPDATE `undo_settings SET undo_period_seconds = 0 WHERE change_type IN ('client_place', 'client_close')` transaction-local. ROLLBACK ved test-slut sikrer ingen lækage. | T10.15     |
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-5.md:3603:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-4.md:12594:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-3.md:7103:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-2.md:7413:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-4.md:5284:1543:  | `supabase/tests/smoke/t10_client_active_check.sql` (V7 + V10 cron-context + V13 undo-setup) | **V13-SETUP (Codex runde 12):** efter `begin;` skal testen sætte `stork.t9_write_authorized='true'` og UPDATE `core_identity.undo_settings SET undo_period_seconds = 0 WHERE change_type IN ('client_place','client_close')` for at omgå T9's 24-timers default-undo-periode. ROLLBACK ved test-slut isolerer ændringen. Uden dette rammer apply-vej `not_yet_due` før aktiv-check. **Tests:** T1: opret aktiv klient → `client_node_place` succeeds → pending oprettes → approve+apply succeeds → placement findes. T2: `client_set_active(client_id, false)` → ny `client_node_place` på samme klient + nyt team → forvent **22023 `client_inactive`**. T3 (apply-path-scenarie): non-admin opretter pending mens klient aktiv → non-admin approver → deaktiver klient → apply → forvent **P0001 `apply_client_place: client_inactive`**. T4: `client_node_close` på inaktiv klient → success (ingen aktiv-check her). **T4a (V14):** `client_node_close` på ikke-eksisterende client_id → forvent **P0002 `client_not_found`** (eksistens-check tilføjet i V14). **T5 superadmin-bypass wrapper (Mathias 2026-05-21):** med superadmin-auth, place på inaktiv klient → success. **T6 (V10 cron-context):** superadmin opretter pending mens klient aktiv → deaktiver klient → simulér cron-apply (kør apply uden auth-context via `reset role` + direct `_apply_client_place`-call eller `pending_change_apply` som service_role) → success (bypass via `is_admin_by_employee_id(requested_by)`). **T7 (V10):** non-admin opretter pending → superadmin approver → klient deaktiveres → cron-apply → success (bypass via approved_by). **T8 (V10):** non-admin opretteauthorized='true'` før `pending_change_apply`.

docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-4.md:12250:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-3.md:6759:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-2.md:7069:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-14.md:112:| 1   | TEKNISK-BLOKERING         | T10.7b + client_node_close | `client_node_place` kalder `pending_change_request` som INSERT'er i `core_identity.pending_changes`. Tabellen har INSERT-policy (T9-fundament-supplement `20260518100000:49-51`) der kræver `current_setting('stork.t9_write_authorized', true) = 'true'`. T10.7b's CREATE OR REPLACE sætter ikke session-var → INSERT vil fejle for authenticated-bruger med FORCE RLS. Samme latente T9-bug findes i `client_node_close` (uændret af V8) og de øvrige 5 T9-pending-wrappers (org*node_upsert, etc.) — men trin 10's scope er kun client-RPC'erne. **Code walk-through missede dette** fordi T9-tests bruger `\_apply*\*`-handlers direkte, aldrig fuld wrapper-vej. | **ACCEPT.** T10.7b udvides: `client_node_place` sætter `set_config('stork.t9_write_authorized', 'true', true)` efter aktiv-check, før `pending_change_request`. Plus ny CREATE OR REPLACE af `client_node_close` med samme session-var (uden aktiv-check — `client_node_close` skal kunne lukke placement på inaktiv klient). Default-privileges på `core_identity` schema (`grant execute on functions to authenticated`, T1) dækker GRANT-kravet — explicit GRANT er ikke nødvendigt. | T10.7b udvidet |
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-4.md:12251:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-3.md:6760:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-2.md:7070:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-14.md:115:**T9-public-wrapper-bug (Code-observation):** Codex' fund afslører at T9's 7 public-wrappers (`org_node_upsert`, `org_node_deactivate`, `team_close`, `employee_place`, `employee_remove_from_node`, `client_node_place`, `client_node_close`) alle mangler `t9_write_authorized`-session-var. Trin 10's scope er kun de to client-RPC'er; de øvrige 5 er T9-arbejde der skal adresseres som G-nummer/separat pakke (T9 ville fungere i tests fordi `_apply_*`-handlers er SECURITY DEFINER og kan kaldes direkte, men authenticated-bruger via wrapper-vej er broken).

Opdater Fundament-tjek-tabel. | T10.13 + Fundament-tjek |

docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-4.md:12268:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-3.md:6777:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-2.md:7087:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-14.md:1261:1543:  | `supabase/tests/smoke/t10_client_active_check.sql` (V7 + V10 cron-context + V13 undo-setup) | **V13-SETUP (Codex runde 12):** efter `begin;` skal testen sætte `stork.t9_write_authorized='true'` og UPDATE `core_identity.undo_settings SET undo_period_seconds = 0 WHERE change_type IN ('client_place','client_close')` for at omgå T9's 24-timers default-undo-periode. ROLLBACK ved test-slut isolerer ændringen. Uden dette rammer apply-vej `not_yet_due` før aktiv-check. **Tests:** T1: opret aktiv klient → `client_node_place` succeeds → pending oprettes → approve+apply succeeds → placement findes. T2: `client_set_active(client_id, false)` → ny `client_node_place` på samme klient + nyt team → forvent **22023 `client_inactive`**. T3 (apply-path-scenarie): non-admin opretter pending mens klient aktiv → non-admin approver → deaktiver klient → apply → forvent **P0001 `apply_client_place: client_inactive`**. T4: `client_node_close` på inaktiv klient → success (ingen aktiv-check her). **T4a (V14):** `client_node_close` på ikke-eksisterende client_id → forvent **P0002 `client_not_found`** (eksistens-check tilføjet i V14). **T5 superadmin-bypass wrapper (Mathias 2026-05-21):** med superadmin-auth, place på inaktiv klient → success. **T6 (V10 cron-context):** superadmin opretter pending mens klient aktiv → deaktiver klient → simulér cron-apply (kør apply uden auth-context via `reset role` + direct `_apply_client_place`-call eller `pending_change_apply` som service_role) → success (bypass via `is_admin_by_employee_id(requested_by)`). **T7 (V10):** non-admin opretter pending → superadmin approver → klient deaktiveres → cron-apply → success (bypass via approved_by). **T8 (V10):** non-admin opretter pending → non-admin approver → klient deaktiveres → cron-apply → P0001 (ingen admin involveret). Test SKAL være `begin;` + `rollback;`-wrapped. |
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-4.md:12269:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-3.md:6778:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-2.md:7088:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-14.md:1267:1579:| Hver write-RPC har GRANT + INSERT/UPDATE-policy + session-var  | ja     | T10.8/T10.9/T10.10/T10.10a/T10.11 — `stork.allow_clients_write` / `allow_client_field_definitions_write` + `revoke/grant execute` + has_permission('manage', true). **T10.7b** (`client_node_place` + `client_node_close` + `_apply_client_place`) — `stork.t9_write_authorized = 'true'` før `pending_change_request` (V9-fix); apply-handler tjekker eksistens (P0002) + aktiv (P0001) med employee-id-baseret admin-bypass (V10-fix); pending_change_apply-dispatcher (T9-supplement) cases `client_place` + `client_close` ramt automatisk. **T10.13** (permission-seed) — `stork.t9_write_authorized` (V4-fix) som krævet af T9-supplement's INSERT-policies på permission_pages/tabs/role_permission_grants. Default-privileges på `core_identity` schema (T1: `grant execute on functions to authenticated`) dækker GRANT for alle T10-RPC'er. |
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-4.md:12270:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-3.md:6779:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-2.md:7089:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-14.md:1286:1734:- T10.7b udvidet: `client_node_place` + ny CREATE OR REPLACE af `client_node_close` sætter `stork.t9_write_authorized = 'true'` før `pending_change_request`. T9-fundament-supplement's `pending_changes_insert`-policy kræver session-var (Codex runde 8 TEKNISK-BLOKERING).
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-4.md:12271:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-3.md:6780:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-2.md:7090:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-14.md:1292:1768:- T10.13: tilføjet `set_config('stork.t9_write_authorized', 'true', false)` før INSERTs — krævet af T9-supplement's INSERT-policies på permission_pages/tabs/role_permission_grants (Codex V3 KRITISK).
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-4.md:12272:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-3.md:6781:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-2.md:7091:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-14.md:1531:  -- / permission_tabs / role_permission_grants kræver stork.t9_write_authorized.
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-4.md:12273:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-3.md:6782:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-2.md:7092:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-14.md:1532:  select set_config('stork.t9_write_authorized', 'true', false);
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-4.md:12274:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-3.md:6783:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-2.md:7093:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-14.md:1599:  | `supabase/tests/smoke/t10_client_active_check.sql` (V7 + V10 cron-context + V13 undo-setup) | **V13-SETUP (Codex runde 12):** efter `begin;` skal testen sætte `stork.t9_write_authorized='true'` og UPDATE `core_identity.undo_settings SET undo_period_seconds = 0 WHERE change_type IN ('client_place','client_close')` for at omgå T9's 24-timers default-undo-periode. ROLLBACK ved test-slut isolerer ændringen. Uden dette rammer apply-vej `not_yet_due` før aktiv-check. **Tests:** T1: opret aktiv klient → `client_node_place` succeeds → pending oprettes → approve+apply succeeds → placement findes. T2: `client_set_active(client_id, false)` → ny `client_node_place` på samme klient + nyt team → forvent **22023 `client_inactive`**. T3 (apply-path-scenarie): non-admin opretter pending mens klient aktiv → non-admin approver → deaktiver klient → apply → forvent **P0001 `apply_client_place: client_inactive`**. T4: `client_node_close` på inaktiv klient → success (ingen aktiv-check her). **T4a (V14):** `client_node_close` på ikke-eksisterende client_id → forvent **P0002 `client_not_found`** (eksistens-check tilføjet i V14). **T5 superadmin-bypass wrapper (Mathias 2026-05-21):** med superadmin-auth, place på inaktiv klient → success. **T6 (V10 cron-context):** superadmin opretter pending mens klient aktiv → deaktiver klient → simulér cron-apply (kør apply uden auth-context via `reset role` + direct `_apply_client_place`-call eller `pending_change_apply` som service_role) → success (bypass via `is_admin_by_employee_id(requested_by)`). **T7 (V10):** non-admin opretter pending → superadmin approver → klient deaktiveres → cron-apply → success (bypass via approved_by). **T8 (V10):** non-admin opretter pending → non-admin approver → klient deaktiveres → cron-apply → P0001 (ingen admin involveret). Test SKAL være `begin;` + `rollback;`-wrapped. |

docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-4.md:12357:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-3.md:6866:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-2.md:7176:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-4.md:98:- PLAN-AFVIGELSE: <hvad>          — afviger fra approved plan
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-4.md:12358:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-3.md:6867:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-2.md:7177:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-4.md:244:| 1   | TEKNISK-BLOKERING | T10.15 `t10_client_active_check.sql` | T9 seed (`20260518000004:228-229`) sætter `undo_settings.undo_period_seconds = 24*3600` for `client_place`/`client_close`. `pending_change_apply` stopper med `not_yet_due` før dispatch til `_apply_client_place`. Test rammer due-gate, ikke aktiv-checken. | **ACCEPT.** T10.15 udvidet med setup-disciplin: BEGIN-blokken sætter `set_config('stork.t9_write_authorized', 'true', true)` + UPDATE `undo_settings SET undo_period_seconds = 0 WHERE change_type IN ('client_place', 'client_close')` transaction-local. ROLLBACK ved test-slut sikrer ingen lækage. | T10.15     |
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-4.md:12359:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-3.md:6868:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-2.md:7178:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-4.md:285:| 1   | TEKNISK-BLOKERING         | T10.7b + client_node_close | `client_node_place` kalder `pending_change_request` som INSERT'er i `core_identity.pending_changes`. Tabellen har INSERT-policy (T9-fundament-supplement `20260518100000:49-51`) der kræver `current_setting('stork.t9_write_authorized', true) = 'true'`. T10.7b's CREATE OR REPLACE sætter ikke session-var → INSERT vil fejle for authenticated-bruger med FORCE RLS. Samme latente T9-bug findes i `client_node_close` (uændret af V8) og de øvrige 5 T9-pending-wrappers (org*node_upsert, etc.) — men trin 10's scope er kun client-RPC'erne. **Code walk-through missede dette** fordi T9-tests bruger `\_apply*\*`-handlers direkte, aldrig fuld wrapper-vej. | **ACCEPT.** T10.7b udvides: `client_node_place` sætter `set_config('stork.t9_write_authorized', 'true', true)` efter aktiv-check, før `pending_change_request`. Plus ny CREATE OR REPLACE af `client_node_close` med samme session-var (uden aktiv-check — `client_node_close` skal kunne lukke placement på inaktiv klient). Default-privileges på `core_identity` schema (`grant execute on functions to authenticated`, T1) dækker GRANT-kravet — explicit GRANT er ikke nødvendigt. | T10.7b udvidet |
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-4.md:12360:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-3.md:6869:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-2.md:7179:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-4.md:288:**T9-public-wrapper-bug (Code-observation):** Codex' fund afslører at T9's 7 public-wrappers (`org_node_upsert`, `org_node_deactivate`, `team_close`, `employee_place`, `employee_remove_from_node`, `client_node_place`, `client_node_close`) alle mangler `t9_write_authorized`-session-var. Trin 10's scope er kun de to client-RPC'er; de øvrige 5 er T9-arbejde der skal adresseres som G-nummer/separat pakke (T9 ville fungere i tests fordi `_apply_*`-handlers er SECURITY DEFINER og kan kaldes direkte, men authenticated-bruger via wrapper-vej er broken).
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-4.md:12361:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-3.md:6870:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-2.md:7180:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-4.md:353:Codex runde 4 (review-fil: `docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-4.md`) leverede 1 fund.
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-4.md:12362:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-3.md:6871:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-2.md:7181:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-4.md:367:| 1   | KRITISK  | T10.13  | T10.13 sætter `stork.source_type` + `stork.change_reason` men IKKE `stork.t9_write_authorized = 'true'` som T9-supplements INSERT-policies på `permission_pages` / `permission_tabs` / `role_permission_grants` kræver. Brudt niveau 1-prefix end-to-end-tjek for INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE-veje (GRANT + policy + session-var-tre-pak). | **ACCEPT.** Tilføj `select set_config('stork.t9_write_authorized', 'true', false);` før INSERTs i T10.13. Opdater Fundament-tjek-tabel. | T10.13 + Fundament-tjek |
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-4.md:12363:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-3.md:6872:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-2.md:7182:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-4.md:480:Planfilen er lang; første læsning gav formål/scope, men build-trinene ligger længere nede. Jeg finder de relevante overskrifter og læser de afsnit, før jeg vurderer runde 4.

docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-4.md:12374:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-3.md:6883:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-2.md:7193:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-4.md:692:1543:  | `supabase/tests/smoke/t10_client_active_check.sql` (V7 + V10 cron-context + V13 undo-setup) | **V13-SETUP (Codex runde 12):** efter `begin;` skal testen sætte `stork.t9_write_authorized='true'` og UPDATE `core_identity.undo_settings SET undo_period_seconds = 0 WHERE change_type IN ('client_place','client_close')` for at omgå T9's 24-timers default-undo-periode. ROLLBACK ved test-slut isolerer ændringen. Uden dette rammer apply-vej `not_yet_due` før aktiv-check. **Tests:** T1: opret aktiv klient → `client_node_place` succeeds → pending oprettes → approve+apply succeeds → placement findes. T2: `client_set_active(client_id, false)` → ny `client_node_place` på samme klient + nyt team → forvent **22023 `client_inactive`**. T3 (apply-path-scenarie): non-admin opretter pending mens klient aktiv → non-admin approver → deaktiver klient → apply → forvent **P0001 `apply_client_place: client_inactive`**. T4: `client_node_close` på inaktiv klient → success (ingen aktiv-check her). **T4a (V14):** `client_node_close` på ikke-eksisterende client_id → forvent **P0002 `client_not_found`** (eksistens-check tilføjet i V14). **T5 superadmin-bypass wrapper (Mathias 2026-05-21):** med superadmin-auth, place på inaktiv klient → success. **T6 (V10 cron-context):** superadmin opretter pending mens klient aktiv → deaktiver klient → simulér cron-apply (kør apply uden auth-context via `reset role` + direct `_apply_client_place`-call eller `pending_change_apply` som service_role) → success (bypass via `is_admin_by_employee_id(requested_by)`). **T7 (V10):** non-admin opretter pending → superadmin approver → klient deaktiveres → cron-apply → success (bypass via approved_by). **T8 (V10):** non-admin opretter pending → non-admin approver → klient deaktiveres → cron-apply → P0001 (ingen admin involveret). Test SKAL være `begin;` + `rollback;`-wrapped. |
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-4.md:12375:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-3.md:6884:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-2.md:7194:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-4.md:703:1579:| Hver write-RPC har GRANT + INSERT/UPDATE-policy + session-var  | ja     | T10.8/T10.9/T10.10/T10.10a/T10.11 — `stork.allow_clients_write` / `allow_client_field_definitions_write` + `revoke/grant execute` + has_permission('manage', true). **T10.7b** (`client_node_place` + `client_node_close` + `_apply_client_place`) — `stork.t9_write_authorized = 'true'` før `pending_change_request` (V9-fix); apply-handler tjekker eksistens (P0002) + aktiv (P0001) med employee-id-baseret admin-bypass (V10-fix); pending_change_apply-dispatcher (T9-supplement) cases `client_place` + `client_close` ramt automatisk. **T10.13** (permission-seed) — `stork.t9_write_authorized` (V4-fix) som krævet af T9-supplement's INSERT-policies på permission_pages/tabs/role_permission_grants. Default-privileges på `core_identity` schema (T1: `grant execute on functions to authenticated`) dækker GRANT for alle T10-RPC'er. |
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-4.md:12376:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-3.md:6885:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-2.md:7195:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-4.md:751:1734:- T10.7b udvidet: `client_node_place` + ny CREATE OR REPLACE af `client_node_close` sætter `stork.t9_write_authorized = 'true'` før `pending_change_request`. T9-fundament-supplement's `pending_changes_insert`-policy kræver session-var (Codex runde 8 TEKNISK-BLOKERING).

docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-4.md:12380:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-3.md:6889:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-2.md:7199:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-4.md:828:docs/strategi/stork-2-0-master-plan.md:1932:| 35  | T9-fundament-supplement (2026-05-18): §1.7 omskrevet til at matche T9-omstart-rammen (mathias-afgoerelser 2026-05-17, 15 punkter). Pre-omsadlings-tekst om 4-dim permission, scope=team, stab-rolle, `org_unit_closure`-navn og `is_compliance_officer()` fjernet som forkert fundament. Tre-niveau permission-model (Område → Page → Tab) + to akser ((kan_tilgå/kan_skrive) × visibility (Sig selv/Hiraki/Alt)) erstatter 4-dim. ÉT træ-anker, knude-løs medarbejder gyldig, klient-til-team-only-binding, fortrydelses-mekanisme. §1.1's session-var-pattern implementeret i T9-write-veje (migration `20260518100000_t9_fundament_supplement.sql`): INSERT/UPDATE-policies med `stork.t9_write_authorized`-check på 6 write-tabeller; 11 write-RPCs sætter session-var efter has_permission-check. H011's §1.7-modsigelse (identificeret 2026-05-15) lukkes. |

docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-4.md:12526:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-3.md:7035:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-2.md:7345:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-4.md:2713:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-13.md:232:| 1   | TEKNISK-BLOKERING | T10.15 `t10_client_active_check.sql` | T9 seed (`20260518000004:228-229`) sætter `undo_settings.undo_period_seconds = 24*3600` for `client_place`/`client_close`. `pending_change_apply` stopper med `not_yet_due` før dispatch til `_apply_client_place`. Test rammer due-gate, ikke aktiv-checken. | **ACCEPT.** T10.15 udvidet med setup-disciplin: BEGIN-blokken sætter `set_config('stork.t9_write_authorized', 'true', true)` + UPDATE `undo_settings SET undo_period_seconds = 0 WHERE change_type IN ('client_place', 'client_close')` transaction-local. ROLLBACK ved test-slut sikrer ingen lækage. | T10.15     |
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-4.md:12527:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-3.md:7036:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-2.md:7346:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-4.md:2719:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-13.md:273:| 1   | TEKNISK-BLOKERING         | T10.7b + client_node_close | `client_node_place` kalder `pending_change_request` som INSERT'er i `core_identity.pending_changes`. Tabellen har INSERT-policy (T9-fundament-supplement `20260518100000:49-51`) der kræver `current_setting('stork.t9_write_authorized', true) = 'true'`. T10.7b's CREATE OR REPLACE sætter ikke session-var → INSERT vil fejle for authenticated-bruger med FORCE RLS. Samme latente T9-bug findes i `client_node_close` (uændret af V8) og de øvrige 5 T9-pending-wrappers (org*node_upsert, etc.) — men trin 10's scope er kun client-RPC'erne. **Code walk-through missede dette** fordi T9-tests bruger `\_apply*\*`-handlers direkte, aldrig fuld wrapper-vej. | **ACCEPT.** T10.7b udvides: `client_node_place` sætter `set_config('stork.t9_write_authorized', 'true', true)` efter aktiv-check, før `pending_change_request`. Plus ny CREATE OR REPLACE af `client_node_close` med samme session-var (uden aktiv-check — `client_node_close` skal kunne lukke placement på inaktiv klient). Default-privileges på `core_identity` schema (`grant execute on functions to authenticated`, T1) dækker GRANT-kravet — explicit GRANT er ikke nødvendigt. | T10.7b udvidet |
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-4.md:12528:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-3.md:7037:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-2.md:7347:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-4.md:2721:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-13.md:276:**T9-public-wrapper-bug (Code-observation):** Codex' fund afslører at T9's 7 public-wrappers (`org_node_upsert`, `org_node_deactivate`, `team_close`, `employee_place`, `employee_remove_from_node`, `client_node_place`, `client_node_close`) alle mangler `t9_write_authorized`-session-var. Trin 10's scope er kun de to client-RPC'er; de øvrige 5 er T9-arbejde der skal adresseres som G-nummer/separat pakke (T9 ville fungere i tests fordi `_apply_*`-handlers er SECURITY DEFINER og kan kaldes direkte, men authenticated-bruger via wrapper-vej er broken).
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-4.md:12529:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-3.md:7038:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-2.md:7348:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-4.md:2744:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-13.md:355:| 1   | KRITISK  | T10.13  | T10.13 sætter `stork.source_type` + `stork.change_reason` men IKKE `stork.t9_write_authorized = 'true'` som T9-supplements INSERT-policies på `permission_pages` / `permission_tabs` / `role_permission_grants` kræver. Brudt niveau 1-prefix end-to-end-tjek for INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE-veje (GRANT + policy + session-var-tre-pak). | **ACCEPT.** Tilføj `select set_config('stork.t9_write_authorized', 'true', false);` før INSERTs i T10.13. Opdater Fundament-tjek-tabel. | T10.13 + Fundament-tjek |

docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-4.md:12534:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-3.md:7043:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-2.md:7353:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-4.md:2997:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-13.md:1725:  1456	  select set_config('stork.t9_write_authorized', 'true', false);
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-4.md:12535:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-3.md:7044:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-2.md:7354:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-4.md:3010:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-13.md:1792:  1523	  | `supabase/tests/smoke/t10_client_active_check.sql` (V7 + V10 cron-context + V13 undo-setup) | **V13-SETUP (Codex runde 12):** efter `begin;` skal testen sætte `stork.t9_write_authorized='true'` og UPDATE `core_identity.undo_settings SET undo_period_seconds = 0 WHERE change_type IN ('client_place','client_close')` for at omgå T9's 24-timers default-undo-periode. ROLLBACK ved test-slut isolerer ændringen. Uden dette rammer apply-vej `not_yet_due` før aktiv-check. **Tests:** T1: opret aktiv klient → `client_node_place` succeeds → pending oprettes → approve+apply succeeds → placement findes. T2: `client_set_active(client_id, false)` → ny `client_node_place` på samme klient + nyt team → forvent **22023 `client_inactive`**. T3 (apply-path-scenarie): non-admin opretter pending mens klient aktiv → non-admin approver → deaktiver klient → apply → forvent **P0001 `apply_client_place: client_inactive`**. T4: `client_node_close` på inaktiv klient → success (ingen aktiv-check her). **T5 superadmin-bypass wrapper (Mathias 2026-05-21):** med superadmin-auth, place på inaktiv klient → success. **T6 (V10 cron-context):** superadmin opretter pending mens klient aktiv → deaktiver klient → simulér cron-apply (kør apply uden auth-context via `reset role` + direct `_apply_client_place`-call eller `pending_change_apply` som service_role) → success (bypass via `is_admin_by_employee_id(requested_by)`). **T7 (V10):** non-admin opretter pending → superadmin approver → klient deaktiveres → cron-apply → success (bypass via approved_by). **T8 (V10):** non-admin opretter pending → non-admin approver → klient deaktiveres → cron-apply → P0001 (ingen admin involveret). Test SKAL være `begin;` + `rollback;`-wrapped. |
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-4.md:12536:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-3.md:7045:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-2.md:7355:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-4.md:3020:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-13.md:1828:  1559	| Hver write-RPC har GRANT + INSERT/UPDATE-policy + session-var  | ja     | T10.8/T10.9/T10.10/T10.10a/T10.11 — `stork.allow_clients_write` / `allow_client_field_definitions_write` + `revoke/grant execute` + has_permission('manage', true). **T10.7b** (`client_node_place` + `client_node_close` + `_apply_client_place`) — `stork.t9_write_authorized = 'true'` før `pending_change_request` (V9-fix); apply-handler tjekker eksistens (P0002) + aktiv (P0001) med employee-id-baseret admin-bypass (V10-fix); pending_change_apply-dispatcher (T9-supplement) cases `client_place` + `client_close` ramt automatisk. **T10.13** (permission-seed) — `stork.t9_write_authorized` (V4-fix) som krævet af T9-supplement's INSERT-policies på permission_pages/tabs/role_permission_grants. Default-privileges på `core_identity` schema (T1: `grant execute on functions to authenticated`) dækker GRANT for alle T10-RPC'er. |
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-4.md:12537:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-3.md:7046:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-2.md:7356:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-4.md:3029:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-13.md:1858:  1589	  - Hvis T1-audit_filter_values' STABLE-modifier blokerer mig fra at læse client_field_definitions (immutability-issue), kan jeg ende med at skifte til VOLATILE — PLAN-AFVIGELSE med G-nummer-forslag.
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-4.md:12538:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-3.md:7047:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-2.md:7357:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-4.md:3053:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-13.md:1951:  1682	V13 bringer trin 10 i mål: klient-skabelonen etableres greenfield i `core_identity` med aktiv/inaktiv-livscyklus + logo (med PII-hashed audit) + FK fra T9's klient-til-team-tilknytning + permission-baserede write-RPC'er + aktiv-check ved nye team-tilknytninger (krav-dok §2.5.2) + session-var fix på T9-public-wrappers for client + employee-id-baseret admin-bypass i cron-context + komplet fundament-tjek-dækning + apply-vej-test-setup. Klient-tabel eksisterer ikke på main før denne pakke (T1 droppede D5's pre-fundament); 16 steps + 3 sub-steps (T10.7a, T10.7b, T10.10a) skaber alle artefakter fra bunden.
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-4.md:12539:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-3.md:7048:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-2.md:7358:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-4.md:3062:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-13.md:1978:  1709	- T10.7b udvidet: `client_node_place` + ny CREATE OR REPLACE af `client_node_close` sætter `stork.t9_write_authorized = 'true'` før `pending_change_request`. T9-fundament-supplement's `pending_changes_insert`-policy kræver session-var (Codex runde 8 TEKNISK-BLOKERING).

docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-4.md:12555:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-3.md:7064:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-2.md:7374:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-4.md:3655:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:10926:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-14.md:71:| 1   | TEKNISK-BLOKERING | T10.15 `t10_client_active_check.sql` | T9 seed (`20260518000004:228-229`) sætter `undo_settings.undo_period_seconds = 24*3600` for `client_place`/`client_close`. `pending_change_apply` stopper med `not_yet_due` før dispatch til `_apply_client_place`. Test rammer due-gate, ikke aktiv-checken. | **ACCEPT.** T10.15 udvidet med setup-disciplin: BEGIN-blokken sætter `set_config('stork.t9_write_authorized', 'true', true)` + UPDATE `undo_settings SET undo_period_seconds = 0 WHERE change_type IN ('client_place', 'client_close')` transaction-local. ROLLBACK ved test-slut sikrer ingen lækage. | T10.15     |
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-4.md:12556:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-3.md:7065:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-2.md:7375:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-4.md:3728:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:11000:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-14.md:1156:27:| 1   | TEKNISK-BLOKERING | T10.15 `t10_client_active_check.sql` | T9 seed (`20260518000004:228-229`) sætter `undo_settings.undo_period_seconds = 24*3600` for `client_place`/`client_close`. `pending_change_apply` stopper med `not_yet_due` før dispatch til `_apply_client_place`. Test rammer due-gate, ikke aktiv-checken. | **ACCEPT.** T10.15 udvidet med setup-disciplin: BEGIN-blokken sætter `set_config('stork.t9_write_authorized', 'true', true)` + UPDATE `undo_settings SET undo_period_seconds = 0 WHERE change_type IN ('client_place', 'client_close')` transaction-local. ROLLBACK ved test-slut sikrer ingen lækage. | T10.15     |
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-4.md:12557:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-3.md:7066:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-2.md:7376:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-4.md:3741:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:11013:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-14.md:1261:1543:  | `supabase/tests/smoke/t10_client_active_check.sql` (V7 + V10 cron-context + V13 undo-setup) | **V13-SETUP (Codex runde 12):** efter `begin;` skal testen sætte `stork.t9_write_authorized='true'` og UPDATE `core_identity.undo_settings SET undo_period_seconds = 0 WHERE change_type IN ('client_place','client_close')` for at omgå T9's 24-timers default-undo-periode. ROLLBACK ved test-slut isolerer ændringen. Uden dette rammer apply-vej `not_yet_due` før aktiv-check. **Tests:** T1: opret aktiv klient → `client_node_place` succeeds → pending oprettes → approve+apply succeeds → placement findes. T2: `client_set_active(client_id, false)` → ny `client_node_place` på samme klient + nyt team → forvent **22023 `client_inactive`**. T3 (apply-path-scenarie): non-admin opretter pending mens klient aktiv → non-admin approver → deaktiver klient → apply → forvent **P0001 `apply_client_place: client_inactive`**. T4: `client_node_close` på inaktiv klient → success (ingen aktiv-check her). **T4a (V14):** `client_node_close` på ikke-eksisterende client_id → forvent **P0002 `client_not_found`** (eksistens-check tilføjet i V14). **T5 superadmin-bypass wrapper (Mathias 2026-05-21):** med superadmin-auth, place på inaktiv klient → success. **T6 (V10 cron-context):** superadmin opretter pending mens klient aktiv → deaktiver klient → simulér cron-apply (kør apply uden auth-context via `reset role` + direct `_apply_client_place`-call eller `pending_change_apply` som service_role) → success (bypass via `is_admin_by_employee_id(requested_by)`). **T7 (V10):** non-admin opretter pending → superadmin approver → klient deaktiveres → cron-apply → success (bypass via approved_by). **T8 (V10):** non-admin opretter pending → non-admin approver → klient deaktiveres → cron-apply → P0001 (ingen admin involveret). Test SKAL være `begin;` + `rollback;`-wrapped. |
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-4.md:12558:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-3.md:7067:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-2.md:7377:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-4.md:3742:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:11014:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-14.md:1267:1579:| Hver write-RPC har GRANT + INSERT/UPDATE-policy + session-var  | ja     | T10.8/T10.9/T10.10/T10.10a/T10.11 — `stork.allow_clients_write` / `allow_client_field_definitions_write` + `revoke/grant execute` + has_permission('manage', true). **T10.7b** (`client_node_place` + `client_node_close` + `_apply_client_place`) — `stork.t9_write_authorized = 'true'` før `pending_change_request` (V9-fix); apply-handler tjekker eksistens (P0002) + aktiv (P0001) med employee-id-baseret admin-bypass (V10-fix); pending_change_apply-dispatcher (T9-supplement) cases `client_place` + `client_close` ramt automatisk. **T10.13** (permission-seed) — `stork.t9_write_authorized` (V4-fix) som krævet af T9-supplement's INSERT-policies på permission_pages/tabs/role_permission_grants. Default-privileges på `core_identity` schema (T1: `grant execute on functions to authenticated`) dækker GRANT for alle T10-RPC'er. |

docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-4.md:12563:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-3.md:7072:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-2.md:7382:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-4.md:3986:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:11265:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-13.md:1792:  1523	  | `supabase/tests/smoke/t10_client_active_check.sql` (V7 + V10 cron-context + V13 undo-setup) | **V13-SETUP (Codex runde 12):** efter `begin;` skal testen sætte `stork.t9_write_authorized='true'` og UPDATE `core_identity.undo_settings SET undo_period_seconds = 0 WHERE change_type IN ('client_place','client_close')` for at omgå T9's 24-timers default-undo-periode. ROLLBACK ved test-slut isolerer ændringen. Uden dette rammer apply-vej `not_yet_due` før aktiv-check. **Tests:** T1: opret aktiv klient → `client_node_place` succeeds → pending oprettes → approve+apply succeeds → placement findes. T2: `client_set_active(client_id, false)` → ny `client_node_place` på samme klient + nyt team → forvent **22023 `client_inactive`**. T3 (apply-path-scenarie): non-admin opretter pending mens klient aktiv → non-admin approver → deaktiver klient → apply → forvent **P0001 `apply_client_place: client_inactive`**. T4: `client_node_close` på inaktiv klient → success (ingen aktiv-check her). **T5 superadmin-bypass wrapper (Mathias 2026-05-21):** med superadmin-auth, place på inaktiv klient → success. **T6 (V10 cron-context):** superadmin opretter pending mens klient aktiv → deaktiver klient → simulér cron-apply (kør apply uden auth-context via `reset role` + direct `_apply_client_place`-call eller `pending_change_apply` som service_role) → success (bypass via `is_admin_by_employee_id(requested_by)`). **T7 (V10):** non-admin opretter pending → superadmin approver → klient deaktiveres → cron-apply → success (bypass via approved_by). **T8 (V10):** non-admin opretter pending → non-admin approver → klient deaktiveres → cron-apply → P0001 (ingen admin involveret). Test SKAL være `begin;` + `rollback;`-wrapped. |
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-4.md:12564:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-3.md:7073:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-2.md:7383:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-4.md:3990:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:11269:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-13.md:1828:  1559	| Hver write-RPC har GRANT + INSERT/UPDATE-policy + session-var  | ja     | T10.8/T10.9/T10.10/T10.10a/T10.11 — `stork.allow_clients_write` / `allow_client_field_definitions_write` + `revoke/grant execute` + has_permission('manage', true). **T10.7b** (`client_node_place` + `client_node_close` + `_apply_client_place`) — `stork.t9_write_authorized = 'true'` før `pending_change_request` (V9-fix); apply-handler tjekker eksistens (P0002) + aktiv (P0001) med employee-id-baseret admin-bypass (V10-fix); pending_change_apply-dispatcher (T9-supplement) cases `client_place` + `client_close` ramt automatisk. **T10.13** (permission-seed) — `stork.t9_write_authorized` (V4-fix) som krævet af T9-supplement's INSERT-policies på permission_pages/tabs/role_permission_grants. Default-privileges på `core_identity` schema (T1: `grant execute on functions to authenticated`) dækker GRANT for alle T10-RPC'er. |
